case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. MERRIDY GALLOWAY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-08-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
